textByHash.606019e3c9cf690e77c4d34c1e324e855b680380: My lady, as I've already said, we really should take you to my surgery in Darkmeyer. Whatever that nylocas did, it was no normal bite.
textByHash.9ce62843eaf1a8a28462f705c586cde2029d1558: I'm right here, my lady. I was just finishing my notes.
textByHash.c26ad3689b699541bb899d906895a14ec2c0bc68: I understand. My notes are finished now. I will leave you in peace.
